ddls:
CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "match_map" TEXT /* Map where the match was played */,
  "match_mode" TEXT /* Game mode of the match (e.g., Ranked, Casual) */,
  "match_duration" REAL /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  "match_result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., victory, defeat) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the match was played (e.g., NA, EUW, KR) */,
  "queue_type" TEXT /* Type of queue (e.g., solo, flex, ranked) */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season when the match was played */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "champions" (
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each champion */,
  "champion_name" TEXT /* Name of the champion */,
  "champion_title" TEXT /* Title of the champion */,
  "champion_attack" INTEGER /* Attack rating of the champion */,
  "champion_defense" INTEGER /* Defense rating of the champion */,
  "champion_magic" INTEGER /* Magic rating of the champion */,
  "champion_difficulty" INTEGER /* Difficulty rating of the champion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("champion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_champion_stats" (
  "match_champion_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match champion statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion */,
  "champion_kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the champion */,
  "champion_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths of the champion */,
  "champion_assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the champion */,
  "champion_farm" INTEGER /* Farm of the champion */,
  "champion_gold" INTEGER /* Gold earned by the champion */,
  "champion_level" INTEGER /* Level of the champion */,
  "champion_first_spell" TEXT /* First summoner spell of the champion */,
  "champion_second_spell" TEXT /* Second summoner spell of the champion */,
  "champion_items" TEXT /* Items bought by the champion */,
  "champion_skills" TEXT /* Skills used by the champion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_champion_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_champion_stats_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_champion_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_modes" (
  "match_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match mode */,
  "match_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the match mode (e.g., Ranked, Casual) */,
  "match_mode_description" TEXT /* Description of the match mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_maps" (
  "match_map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match map */,
  "match_map_name" TEXT /* Name of the match map (e.g., Summoner's Rift) */,
  "match_map_description" TEXT /* Description of the match map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "summoner_spells" (
  "summoner_spell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summoner spell */,
  "summoner_spell_name" TEXT /* Name of the summoner spell (e.g., SummonerHeal, SummonerFlash) */,
  "summoner_spell_description" TEXT /* Description of the summoner spell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summoner_spell_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "champion_roles" (
  "champion_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each champion role */,
  "champion_role_name" TEXT /* Name of the champion role (e.g., top, jungle, mid, marksman, support) */,
  "champion_role_description" TEXT /* Description of the champion role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("champion_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_champion_roles" (
  "match_champion_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match champion role */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion */,
  "champion_role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_champion_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_champion_roles_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_champion_roles_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_champion_roles_champion_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_role_id") REFERENCES champion_roles ("champion_role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, player) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_summoner_spells" (
  "match_summoner_spell_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match summoner spell */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "summoner_spell_id" INTEGER /* ID of the summoner spell */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_summoner_spell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_summoner_spells_summoner_spell_id FOREIGN KEY ("summoner_spell_id") REFERENCES summoner_spells ("summoner_spell_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_summoner_spells_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_participants" (
  "match_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match participant */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_participants_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_participants_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_participants_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_participant_stats" (
  "match_participant_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match participant statistic */,
  "match_participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match participant */,
  "kills" INTEGER /* Number of kills by the participant */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths of the participant */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists by the participant */,
  "farm" INTEGER /* Farm of the participant */,
  "gold" INTEGER /* Gold earned by the participant */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_participant_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_participant_stats_match_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_participant_id") REFERENCES match_participants ("match_participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_champion_bans" (
  "match_champion_ban_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match champion ban */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_champion_ban_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_champion_bans_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_champion_bans_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_objectives" (
  "match_objective_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match objective */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "objective_type" TEXT /* Type of objective (e.g., dragon, baron, tower) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that took the objective */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp when the objective was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_objective_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_objectives_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_objectives_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_timeline" (
  "match_timeline_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match timeline event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., champion kill, objective taken) */,
  "timestamp" REAL /* Timestamp of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_timeline_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_timeline_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "team_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the team */,
  "loss_rate" REAL /* Loss rate of the team */,
  "average_gold" REAL /* Average gold earned by the team */,
  "average_kills" REAL /* Average kills by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the player */,
  "loss_rate" REAL /* Loss rate of the player */,
  "average_kills" REAL /* Average kills by the player */,
  "average_deaths" REAL /* Average deaths of the player */,
  "average_assists" REAL /* Average assists by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "champion_statistics" (
  "champion_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each champion statistic */,
  "champion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the champion */,
  "loss_rate" REAL /* Loss rate of the champion */,
  "average_kills" REAL /* Average kills by the champion */,
  "average_deaths" REAL /* Average deaths of the champion */,
  "average_assists" REAL /* Average assists by the champion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("champion_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_champion_statistics_champion_id FOREIGN KEY ("champion_id") REFERENCES champions ("champion_id")
)
